headline: Cathie Wood, Ark Funds Lay Out New $3,000 Price Target For Tesla Shares: What Investors Should Know
summary: Ark Funds CEO and Co-Founder Cathie Wood joined Benzinga for the “Raz Report” interview earlier this month. At that time, Wood promised a new price target was coming on Tesla from Ark.On Friday, it arrived.

headline: 3 Stocks To Go With Your National Corn Dog Day And March Madness Festivities
summary:
Today is the first day of spring and it's also National Corn Dog Day, held on the first Saturday of the NCAA Men's Division I Basketball Championship.

If you think there's no connection to stocks, think again.

Here are three stocks with exposure to the treat, albeit through the version found in the frozen-food aisle, not at your local fair.

headline: Apple Ordered To Pay $308.5 Million In Patent Infringement Case
summary: Apple could have to pay $308.5 million for infringing a digital rights management patent.

headline: Musk Says Tesla Would Be 'Shut Down' If Its Cars Were Used To Spy In China
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has responded to news reports that its vehicles have been banned from locations in China considered sensitive by the government.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Comcast, Disney, Nike, Starbucks, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The past week's bullish calls included coffee, media and cybersecurity leaders.

headline: Analyst Perspective: Walmart Vs. Target Vs. Amazon In Grocery Wars
summary: What happens when two of the largest U.S. retailers take on the behemoth of the e-commerce universe in a battle for American grocery shoppers, with investors placing their bets on the sidelines?
